---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# AbstractQuantumObject

```{julia}
using QuantumToolbox
```

```{julia}
@doc AbstractQuantumObject
subtypes(AbstractQuantumObject)
```

>QuantumObject
>QuantumObjectEvolution

## QuantumObject

```{julia}
@doc QuantumObject
```

### fields

```{julia}
fieldnames(QuantumObject)
```

>(:data, :type, :dimensions)

## QuantumObjectEvolution

```{julia}
@doc QuantumObjectEvolution
```

### fields

```{julia}
fieldnames(QuantumObjectEvolution)
```

### methods

Wait for the usage.
